message: Growing up, my kids always thought storms were the perfect excuse to test how many times they could jump on the bed before I noticed. Now that I’m a grandparent, I see the fun side of it, but also the importance of being calm and prepared. I found a handy resource that’s great for understanding thunderstorms and how to stay safe. It's a reminder that a little knowledge can help us turn those stormy days into cozy family time. What’s your favorite indoor activity during a storm? ☔️
